differentials.name: dental hypoplasia
differentials.raw: dental hypoplasia (delayed tooth eruption, impaction of teeth, supernumerary teeth)

context: √  premature closure of epiphyses √  hypoplasia of tooth enamel + dentine; blunting of roots √  generalized increase in bone density in 9%: √  localized thickening of skull √  sacroiliac sclerosis √  bandlike density in metaphysis of long bones (25%), iliac crest, vertebral bodies √  thickened lamina dura (inner table) + widened diploe √  deformed hips with thickening + sclerosis of femoral head + acetabulum @   Soft tissue √  intracranial calcifications in basal ganglia, choroid plexus, occasionally in cerebellum √  calcification of spinal and other ligaments √  subcutaneous calcifications √
